name: ScrapFly Web Scraping API
what_it_does: Web scraping API with built-in anti-bot bypass, rotating proxies, JavaScript rendering, and screenshot capabilities — returning cleaned HTML or extracted data from any webpage with a single API call.
use_cases: Scraping JavaScript-rendered content from single-page applications for agents
Extracting structured data from pages with anti-bot protection
Taking full-page screenshots of websites for visual monitoring agents
Monitoring price changes on e-commerce sites without bot detection
Building web data pipelines with proxy rotation and CAPTCHA handling
not_for: Legally prohibited scraping — verify ToS compliance before use
Real-time data requiring sub-second response times
High-volume scraping at millions of requests per day (consider enterprise plans)
best_when: An agent needs a developer-friendly scraping API with good anti-bot bypass and transparent pricing without minimum commitments.
avoid_when: You need Scrapy-native integration or AI-powered structured data extraction — use Zyte or Apify.

auth.notes: API key passed as query parameter. Simple single-key authentication. No OAuth or scope granularity. Credit-based consumption model with key.

pricing.notes: Credit-based pricing where different features cost different credit amounts. JavaScript rendering costs 10x credits. Anti-scraping bypass costs 25x credits. Transparent credit pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Concurrent requests limited by plan; retry on failure built into SDK

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Good documentation with Python and Node.js examples. Error responses include failure reason codes. SDK handles retries and error cases. Screenshot endpoint well-documented for visual scraping.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All scraping requests are stateless. Same URL may return different results as target changes. Safe to retry failed requests.
known_agent_gotchas: Credit costs vary dramatically by feature — JavaScript rendering and anti-bot bypass expensive
Anti-bot bypass ('asp' parameter) may still fail on highly protected sites
Response time highly variable (2-15 seconds) — agents need generous timeouts
EU-based data residency — verify compliance for data leaving EU in agent workflows

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key in query parameter (appears in logs). No scope granularity. GDPR compliant (EU-based). Legal compliance for scraping is user responsibility.
